name: chain_ph_launch_cacheless_aipowered_mac_sy
method: [PH LAUNCH] Cacheless: AI-Powered Mac System Data Cleaner

stages.task: Scrape PH daily launches via requests+JSON API, extract app name, category, upvote count, founder Twitter/website/email
Filter for Mac/utility/productivity apps with 50+ upvotes. Score by founder contactability (has Twitter or email). Flag Mac utility apps for APP_FACTORY catalog separately.
Generate personalized cold outreach referencing specific PH launch and category. Offer: growth audit, ASO optimization, content marketing setup. Append to LEDGER/ph_outreach_queue.csv.
